meta.title: ProjectPulse — Multi-industry technical project control
meta.description: Project control for technical teams shipping physical parts — from the job site to the CNC shop. CAD/3D viewer (DWG, DXF, STL, 3MF), geolocated evidence, AI audits and client sign-off.

hero.subheadline: Project control for technical teams shipping physical parts — from the job site to the CNC shop.
hero.subheadline2: Construction, architecture, jewelry, 3D printing, CNC machining, installations, prototyping and digital fabrication — one console with CAD/3D viewer, geolocated evidence, AI audits and client approval.
hero.trustLine: 14-day free trial · No credit card · Cancel anytime

verticals.title: One platform, eight industries
verticals.subtitle: If your team ships physical parts, ProjectPulse runs the project end-to-end — whatever the vertical.

items.title: Construction
items.body: Job site supervision, progress tracking and audited on-site evidence.

items.title: Architecture
items.body: DWG/DXF blueprints, design reviews and client sign-off.

items.title: Jewelry
items.body: 3D parts (STL/3MF), prototypes and final-client approval.

items.title: 3D Printing
items.body: Prints, iterative prototypes and per-part QA.

items.title: CNC Machining
items.body: Machined parts, dimensional inspection and traceability.

items.title: Installations
items.body: Maintenance, commissioning and geolocated on-site evidence.

items.title: Rapid Prototyping
items.body: Agile iterations with version history and client feedback.

items.title: Digital Fabrication
items.body: Digital workshop with quality control, traceability and auditable deliverables.

items.label: NPS from supervisors in the field

features.title: Everything you need to deliver projects on time
features.subtitle: Built by and for teams shipping physical parts — not by a PM who never set foot in a workshop or on a job site.

items.title: Geolocated evidence
items.body: Every capture with coordinates, timestamp and owner. No more orphan photos without context.

items.title: AI-powered (artificial intelligence) audits
items.body: Quality reviewed automatically against the technical specification. Score and actionable feedback before you invoice.

items.title: Multi-tenant RBAC (Role-Based Access Control)
items.body: Admin, owner, supervisor, helper, client. Strict per-company isolation — zero leakage.

items.title: Client portal
items.body: Your client approves deliverables and tracks progress in their own console. No more PDFs over WhatsApp.

items.title: CAD and 3D viewer
items.body: Upload DWG, DXF, PDF, STL, 3MF and GLB. View 2D blueprints and 3D models (prints, machined parts, jewelry), link tasks to project zones.

items.title: Exports and reports
items.body: CSV and executive summaries ready for stakeholders. Full traceability for external audits.

steps.title: From zero to production in 72 hours

items.title: Register your company
items.body: Sign up in minutes. Full 14-day trial, no credit card required.

items.title: Invite your team
items.body: Supervisors, helpers and clients, each with their own role and permissions.

items.title: Capture and approve
items.body: Geolocated evidence, AI audit, client signs off.

testimonial.quotePart1: We went from Excel reports and WhatsApp photos to auditable evidence in minutes. Our clients sign off on deliverables
testimonial.multiVerticalNote: Also used by teams in jewelry, 3D printing, CNC machining and architecture.

infra.subtitle: Military-grade infrastructure for teams that don't accept "good enough".

items.title: Our own infra
items.body: Dedicated servers in Mexico. No foreign data residency, no CPU shared with another SaaS. Low latency from any job site.

items.title: Daily backups
items.body: Encrypted snapshots every 24h with 30-day retention. Point-in-time recovery if something blows up at 3 a.m.

items.title: Per-tenant isolation
items.body: Row-level isolation with tenant_id on every query. Strict RBAC (Role-Based Access Control): admin, owner, supervisor, helper, client. Zero cross-company leakage.

pricing.title: Plans for every team size
pricing.subtitle: Start free and scale when you need to. No surprises, no hidden fees.

items.a: 14 days free with every Professional-plan feature. No credit card required. At the end you pick a plan or drop to the free Starter tier.
Yes. Cancel with one click from your billing portal and keep access until the end of the paid period.
On our own dedicated infrastructure, with encrypted daily backups. We never share data across tenants.
Yes, CSV/PDF exports are included in every paid plan. Your data is yours, always.
Not yet. Today we only support local JWT auth. SSO/SAML is on the Enterprise roadmap — contact sales if it's a requirement for your organization.

items.q: How does the AI audit work?
items.a: When you upload a capture we analyze it against the deliverable's technical spec and return a score plus actionable items.

items.q: What happens if I exceed my plan limits?
items.a: We warn you before you hit the limit and you can upgrade with one click — without losing data or blocking the team.
Yes, on Professional and Business. Contact sales for details and Enterprise terms.

finalCta.subtitle: 14 days free with every feature. No credit card, no commitment.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.intro: These Terms of Service govern your access to and use of ProjectPulse. By creating an account or using the platform you agree to these terms.

s1.title: 1. Accounts
s1.body: You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your credentials and for all activity that occurs under your account. Notify us immediately of any unauthorized use.

s2.title: 2. Acceptable use
s2.body: You agree not to misuse the platform: no reverse engineering, no unlawful content, no attempts to disrupt the service or circumvent quotas, and no uploading of data you do not have rights to share.

s3.title: 3. Billing
s3.body: Paid plans are billed in advance through Stripe. You can cancel at any time from the billing portal; cancellations take effect at the end of the current billing period. No refunds for partial periods.

s4.title: 4. Liability
s4.body: The service is provided "as is" without warranties of any kind. Our aggregate liability is limited to the fees you paid in the twelve months preceding the claim.

contact.title: Contact
contact.body: Questions about these terms? Email legal@projectpulse.app.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: This Privacy Policy explains what data ProjectPulse collects, how we use it, and the rights you have over it.

s1.title: 1. Data we collect
s1.body: Account data (name, email, role), project data you upload (photos, blueprints, notes), and technical logs (IP, user agent, timestamps) needed to operate the service.

s2.title: 2. How we use it
s2.body: Strictly to deliver the service: authentication, multi-tenant isolation, billing, support, and abuse prevention. We do not sell your data.

s3.title: 3. Subprocessors
s3.body: We rely on Stripe (payments), Resend (transactional email), Google Gemini (AI quality audits, only when enabled), and a VPS provider for hosting. Each is contractually bound to protect your data.

s4.title: 4. Retention
s4.body: Data is retained while your tenant is active. On deletion, personal data is purged within 30 days; backups are rotated out within 90 days.

s5.title: 5. Your rights
s5.body: You can access, export, or delete your data at any time from settings, or by contacting us.

contact.title: Contact
contact.body: Questions or data requests? Email privacy@projectpulse.app.
